panels.heading: Accessible, with sound
panels.desc: An interface that works the way you do - screen-reader friendly and fully keyboard-navigable throughout. Turn on gentle interface sounds, or switch to **Neurospicy Mode**: a calm focus beat that loops quietly while you work.

panels.heading: Organise, then render in bulk
panels.desc: Keep saved work in nested **Projects** folders. When it's time to ship, render a whole folder - or any handful you select - into a single zip. No spreadsheet, no batch grid required.
